title: Map a handler boundary without framework leakage
scenario: A handler adapter should translate request DTOs, call the use case, and return response data without pushing HTTP concepts into domain code.
instructions: Implement handle_register_user by converting the request, calling register_user, and mapping outcomes to Response values.

hints.body: Keep the Register user use case boundaries code active and implement handle_register_user by converting the request, calling register_user, and mapping outcomes to Response values.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Map a handler boundary without framework leakage is shown below.

completionExplanation: Map a handler boundary without framework leakage now extends the active Register user use case boundaries code with register handler boundary. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
